expectations.text: Handler uses Claims or WriteAccess extractor for authentication
Queries filter by organizacion_id from claims (tenant scoping)
expectations.evidence: service.rs filters with `pago::Column::OrganizacionId.eq(org_id)` where org_id comes from claims.organizacion_id

expectations.text: Applies a default date range or maximum date range limit to prevent unbounded exports
expectations.evidence: service.rs does NOT apply any default date range when no dates are provided. If both fecha_inicio and fecha_fin are None, the query returns ALL pagos for the org with no date boundary.

expectations.text: Sets Content-Disposition: attachment header on the response
Logs the export event with structured tracing fields
expectations.evidence: Neither handler.rs nor service.rs contain any tracing::info!, tracing::warn!, or logging calls for the export event

expectations.text: Does not expose internal error details in the response body
expectations.evidence: Uses AppError types throughout which map to safe responses

expectations.text: Caps row count or enforces date boundaries to prevent memory exhaustion
expectations.evidence: No row count cap and no date boundary default. The query can return unlimited rows if no date filters are provided.
